Currently living in Honeyfern Woods, Waverly Bottom has established herself as a significant talent in construction. A native of Goldfinch Row, she pursued her studies at Azure Peak College before starting her career with Nickel Bark Construction. Her exceptional skill and dedication led her to receive the Ravenleaf Distinction, an honor within the industry. Waverly's life and work are deeply intertwined with nature, which fuels her passion for her profession.
